extraction_notes: PDF is bilingual: Kannada pages 1-38, English pages 41-71. Pages 39-40 and 72-73 are budget summary tables.
Source text extracted via Tesseract OCR (kan+eng) at 300 DPI; pdfplumber yielded (cid:NNNN) tokens for Kannada, PyMuPDF yielded a mix of Unicode + font-remapped glyphs. OCR gives clean text.

Speech is structured as 111 numbered items organised under 14 section headings (Administration, Finance & Accounts, Advertisement, Revenue, Land Acquisition, Public Relations, Urban Planning, Public Works, Lakes Division, Education, Forestry, Horticulture, Health, Sanitation, Animal Husbandry, Welfare).
Amounts quoted in crore (1 crore = 100 lakh) are converted to lakhs here for consistency with the rest of this codebase.

Some items are revenue targets (property tax, advertisement, Premium FAR, B->A Khata conversion) rather than expenditures; they are captured and tagged with category 'revenue' in the notes where relevant.

Items without a specific named scheme or quoted amount have been omitted per spec (e.g. general 'improve parks' statements). All 111 speech items were reviewed; only those with concrete named initiatives or specific quoted amounts are included.
Page numbers below refer to English-section pages (41-71). Kannada-section page numbers for the same items run roughly pages 8-37.

projects.name: Phased development of remaining 6 lakes (of 59)
projects.description: Develop the 6 undeveloped lakes (of 59 total living lakes; 43 developed, 9 partial) in a phased manner.
projects.verbatim_quote: Of these, 43 lakes have been fully developed, 9 lakes have been partially developed, and 6 lakes remain to be developed. Action will be taken to develop the remaining lakes in a phased manner.

projects.name: Lake encroachment clearance and fencing
projects.description: Survey, clear encroachments and fence BSCC lakes to ensure protection.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action has been taken to protect all our Lakes; Majority of the Lakes have already been surveyed. Encroachments are being cleared... It is proposed to fence encroachment free lakes.

projects.name: BWSSB treated-water channel to developed lakes
projects.description: Channel treated sewage water from Sarakki Lake STP to Ganapati Pura, Kothanur, Chunchaghatta, Somasundarapalya, Mangammanapalya, Chikkabegur, Gottigere and Doddakammannahalli lakes.
projects.verbatim_quote: Pipeline works have already been undertaken to channel treated water from the sewage treatment plant established at Sarakki Lake by the Bangalore Water Supply and Sewerage Board (BWSSB) to fill up the developed lakes such as Ganapati Pura, Kothanur, and Chunchaghatta lakes.
projects.verbatim_quote_local: ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆ ಆಯವ್ಯಯ 2026-27 ಮೂಲಭೂತ ಸೌಕರ್ಯದ ಅಭಿವೃದ್ದಿಗೆ ಹಾಗೂ ಪಾಲಿಕೆಯ ಆಸ್ತಿ ಸೃಜನೆ ಹಾಗೂ ಪಾಲಿಕೆಗೆ ಸಂಪನ್ಮೂಲ ಒದಗಿಸುವ ಕಾಮಗಾರಿಗಳಿಗೆ ವಿನಿಯೋಗಿಸಲು ವಿಶೇಷ ಯೋಜನೆಯನ್ನು ರೂಪಿಸಲಾಗುವುದು. 49, ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆಗೆ 16ನೇ ಕೇಂದ್ರ ಹಣಕಾಸು ಆಯೋಗದ ಅನುದಾನದಡಿ ರೂ: 128.29 ಕೋಟಿಗಳ. ಅನುದಾನ ಬಿಡುಗಡೆಗೊಳ್ಳುವ ವಿರೀಕ್ಟೆಯ

projects.name: Apartment treated-water piping to surrounding lakes
projects.description: Use treated excess water from residential apartment complexes to top up surrounding lakes per KSPCB standards.
projects.verbatim_quote: It is proposed to utilise the treated excess water from the residential Apartment Complexes to fill up surrounding lakes in accordance with the standards prescribed by the Karnataka State Pollution Control Board (KSPCB).

projects.name: Begur & Madiwala Lake boating (tourism)
projects.description: Pilot PPP-model boating facility at Begur and Madiwala Lakes for tourism.
projects.verbatim_quote: Begur and Madiwala Lakes will be developed from Tourism Perspective. It is proposed to introduce Boating Facilities in these two lakes on a pilot basis on PPP model.

projects.name: Lake Mitra (Kere Mitra) community initiative
projects.description: Citizen-led initiative with walkers, residents and public to create a high-quality ecological environment in lakes.
projects.verbatim_quote: A new initiative titled "Lake Mitra" will be introduced to create a high-quality ecological environment in lakes, with the cooperation of walkers, residents and the general public.
projects.verbatim_quote_local: ಗುರುತಿಸಿದ್ದು €6ಗಅಥವಾ PPP ಯೋಜನೆಯಡಿ ಹ೦ತ ಹ೦ತವಾಗಿ ಕಾಮಗಾರಿ ಕೃಗೊಳ್ಳಲಾಗುವುದು. ಕೆರೆಗಳ ವಿಭಾಗ 54. ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆಯ ವ್ಯಾವ್ತಿಗೆ ಒಟ್ಟು 59 ಜೀವಂ೦ತ ಕೆರೆಗಳಿರುತ್ತದೆ. ಅವುಗಳಲ್ಲಿ 43 ಕೆರೆಗಳು ಅಭಿವೃದ್ದಿ ಹೊ೦ದಿದ್ದು,9 ಕೆರೆಗಳು ಭಾಗಶಃ ಅಭಿವೃದ್ದಿ .. ಪಡಿಸಲಾಗಿರುತ್ತದೆ. 6 ಕೆರೆಗಳು ಅಭಿವೃದ್ದಿ ಬಾಕಿ ಇರುತ್ತದೆ. ಸದರಿ ಬಾಕಿ ಇರುವಕೆರೆಗ

projects.name: Open well recharge and restoration
projects.description: Comprehensive plan to recharge and restore open wells and use them to water surrounding parks and greenery.
projects.verbatim_quote: A Comprehensive action plan will be designed to recharge and restore the open wells within the Bengaluru South City Corporation limits and utilize them for watering surrounding parks, greenery and vegetation.
projects.verbatim_quote_local: ಗುರುತಿಸಿದ್ದು €6ಗಅಥವಾ PPP ಯೋಜನೆಯಡಿ ಹ೦ತ ಹ೦ತವಾಗಿ ಕಾಮಗಾರಿ ಕೃಗೊಳ್ಳಲಾಗುವುದು. ಕೆರೆಗಳ ವಿಭಾಗ 54. ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆಯ ವ್ಯಾವ್ತಿಗೆ ಒಟ್ಟು 59 ಜೀವಂ೦ತ ಕೆರೆಗಳಿರುತ್ತದೆ. ಅವುಗಳಲ್ಲಿ 43 ಕೆರೆಗಳು ಅಭಿವೃದ್ದಿ ಹೊ೦ದಿದ್ದು,9 ಕೆರೆಗಳು ಭಾಗಶಃ ಅಭಿವೃದ್ದಿ .. ಪಡಿಸಲಾಗಿರುತ್ತದೆ. 6 ಕೆರೆಗಳು ಅಭಿವೃದ್ದಿ ಬಾಕಿ ಇರುತ್ತದೆ. ಸದರಿ ಬಾಕಿ ಇರುವಕೆರೆಗ

projects.name: Free uniforms, books, shoes, bags for BSCC school/college students
projects.description: Free school uniforms, notebooks, textbooks, shoes, socks and school bags for ~690 students in 5 nursery schools, 1 high school and 1 PU college run by BSCC.
projects.verbatim_quote: Students studying in these institutions will be provided free school uniforms, notebooks, textbooks, shoes, socks, and school bags. An amount of Rs.2.00 crore has been earmarked in the 2026-27 Budget for this purpose.
projects.verbatim_quote_local: ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆ ಆಯವ್ಯಯ 2026-27 ಸಂಸ್ಕರಿಸಿದ . ನೀರನ್ನು ಹರಿಸಲು. ಕ್ರಮ ವಹಿಸಲಾಗುವುದು. 57. ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆಯ ಕೆರೆಗಳ ಸುತ್ತಲೂ ಇರುವ ಖಾಸಗಿ ವಸತಿ ಸಮುಚ್ಚಯಗಳಿ೦ದ ತ್ಯಾಜ್ಯ ವೀರು ಸಂಸ್ಕರಿಸಿ ಕೆರೆಗೆ ಕರ್ನಾಟಕ ಮಾಲಿನ್ಯ ವಿಯಂತ್ರಣಾ ಮಂಡಳಿಯ ಮಾನದ

projects.name: School/college purified drinking-water units
projects.description: Install purified drinking-water units in BSCC schools and colleges.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action will be taken to provide purified drinking water units in schools and colleges under the Bengaluru South City Corporation.

projects.name: Phased renovation of old school/college buildings
projects.description: Phased renovation of old school and college buildings within BSCC.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action will be undertaken to renovate old buildings of schools and colleges within the Corporation's jurisdiction.

projects.name: NGO-supported quality education programme
projects.description: Quality education in BSCC schools and colleges with the support of citizens and NGOs.
projects.verbatim_quote: Efforts will be made to provide quality education in the Corporation's schools and colleges with the support of citizens and NGOs.

projects.name: School-zone parking & drop-off regulation
projects.description: Regulate parking and drop-off/pick-up in school zones with Traffic Police assistance.
projects.verbatim_quote: Steps will be taken to regulate parking, as well as drop-off and pick-up arrangements in school zones, with the assistance of the Traffic Police.

projects.name: Digital learning - Smart boards in BSCC schools/colleges
projects.description: Install smart boards in classrooms as part of the digital learning initiative.
projects.verbatim_quote: Digital learning will be promoted in schools and colleges under the Bengaluru South City Corporation. As part of this initiative, smart boards will be installed in classrooms.
projects.verbatim_quote_local: ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆ ಆಯವ್ಯಯ 2026-27 61. ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆಯಲ್ಲಿ 5 ಶಿಶುವಿಹಾರ ಶಾಲೆಗಳು, 1 ಪ್ರೌಢಶಾಲೆ 1- ಪದವಿ ಪೂರ್ವ ಕಾಲೇಜುಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಸುಮಾರು 690 WOODEND) ವ್ಯಾಸ೦ಗ ಮಾಡುತ್ತಿದ್ದು ಸದರಿ ಶಿಕ್ಷಣ ಸ೦ಸ್ಥೆಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ವ್ಯಾಸ೦ಗ ಮಾಡುತ್ತಿರುವ ಖಿದ್ಯಾರ್ಥಿಗಳಿಗೆ ಉಚಿತವಾಗಿ ಶಾಲಾ ಸಮವಸ್ತ್ರ ಗಳು ನೋಟ್‌ ಪುಸ್ತಕಗಳು, ಪಠ್ಯ ಪುಸ್ತಕಗಳ

projects.description: Plant and maintain 25,000 saplings of different species in collaboration with BMRCL and K-RIDE during 2026-27 (up from 12,000 in 2025-26).
projects.verbatim_quote: During 2026-27, it is proposed to plant and maintain 25,000 saplings of different species in collaboration with the Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation Limited and K-RIDE.

projects.name: Hazardous tree-branch reporting software app
projects.description: Pre-monsoon identification/removal of dry and hazardous tree branches, plus a public software app for reporting hazardous trees.
projects.verbatim_quote: a software application will be developed for the public to report hazardous trees, and a mechanism will be put in place for their timely removal.

projects.name: Wildlife rescue & relocation programme
projects.description: Rescue and relocate snakes, injured birds, reptiles, monkeys to prevent human-animal conflicts.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action to rescue injured birds, animals, reptiles and wildlife etc with the help of Wildlife rescuers will be undertaken... and release them into appropriate habitats or rehabilitation centres.
projects.verbatim_quote_local: ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆ ಆಯವ್ಯಯ 2026-27 ತರಗತಿಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಸ್ಮಾರ್ಟ ಬೋರ್ಡ್‌ ಅಳವಡಿಸಲು ಕ್ರಮವಹಿಸಲಾಗುವುದು. ಅರಣ್ಯ “ಹಸಿರನ್ನೇ ಉಸಿರಾಡಿ, ಹಸಿರಿನ ಜೋತೆಗೆ ಜೀವಿಸಿ, ಹಸಿರಿನ ಜೋತೆಗೆ ಮು೦ದಿನ ಜೀವನ ಪಯಣ ಸಾಗಿಸೋಣ” 67. ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆಯ ವ್ಯಾಪ್ತಿಯಲ್ಲಿ. ಅಂದಾಜು 2.40 ಲಕ್ಷಗಳ ಮರಗಳಿದ್ದು, ಇದು ಶೇ 11 ರಷ್ಟು ಭೌಗೊಳಿಕ ಪ್ರದೇಶದ ವ್ಯಾಪ್ತಿ

projects.name: Smruti Van (Memorial Forest) of medicinal trees
projects.description: Establish a special Smruti Van memorial forest prioritising medicinal-value trees.
projects.verbatim_quote: It is proposed to establish a special "Smruti Van" (Memorial Forest) by giving priority to trees with medicinal value within the Corporation limits.

projects.name: World Environment Day and forestry awareness programmes
projects.description: Programmes such as World Environment Day celebrations and awareness events to build concern for environment/forests among public, students and organisations.
projects.verbatim_quote: Programs such as the celebration of World Environment Day and other environmental awareness events will be organized.

projects.name: Bamboo & biodiversity plantation along lake boundaries
projects.description: Plant 25,000 bamboo saplings along lake boundaries and 40,000 biodiversity saplings under the compensatory plantation and maintenance grant.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action will be taken to plant 25,000 bamboo saplings of different species along the boundary areas of lakes... Additionally, under the compensatory plantation and maintenance grant, 40,000 biodiversity saplings will be planted and maintained.

projects.name: Development of 88 BDA-transferred parks
projects.description: Develop and beautify 88 parks (3.52 lakh sq m) recently handed over by the Bangalore Development Authority.
projects.verbatim_quote: Recently, 88 parks covering approximately 3.52 lakh square meters have been handed over by the Bangalore Development Authority. It is proposed to develop these parks.
projects.verbatim_quote_local: ್ಧಿಪಡಿಸಿ ಶೀಘ್ರ ತೆರೆವಿಗೆ ಕಾರ್ಯಯೋಜನೆ ರೂಪಿಸಲಾಗುವುದು. 69. ಬೆ೦ಗಳೂರು ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ನಗರ ಪಾಲಿಕೆಯ ವ್ಯಾಪ್ತಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾನವ ವನ್ಯಜೀವಿ ಸಂಘರ್ಷ ತಡೆಗಟ್ಟುವ ವಿಟ್ಟೆನಲ್ಲಿ ವನ್ಯಜೀವಿ ಸ೦ರಕ್ಷಕರಿಂದ ಸಾರ್ವಜನಿಕರಿಗೆ ತೊಂದರೆಯುಂಟು ಮಾಡುವ ಹಾವುಗಳು, ಗಾಯಗೊಂಡ ಪಕ್ಷಿಗಳು, ಸರಿಸ್ಕಪಗಳು ಹಾಗೂ ಮಂ೦ಗಳನ್ನು ಸೆರೆಹಿಡಿದು ಸೂಕ್ತ ಆವಾಸ ಸ್ಥಾನಕ್ಕೆ ಹಾಗೂ ಪುನಠ್‌ವಸತಿ ಕೇ೦ದ್ರಗ

commissioner_intro_text: Hon’ble Deputy Chief Minister, Ministers, Members of Parliament, Members of the Legislative Assembly, and enlightened citizens of Bengaluru, |, Shri Ramesh K. N., 1.A.S., Commissioner of the Bengaluru South City Corporation, present before you the Revised Estimates for the year 2025-26 and the Budget Estimates for the year 2026-27 of the Bengaluru South City Corporation. This is not merely a financial statement but a vision document to transform our city into a green, safe, sustainable, equitable, and community-friendly place. Beyond construction of roads and expansion of infrastructure, the Bengaluru South City Corporation is making sincere efforts to build a city that is safe, inclusive, s
commissioner_closing_text: Let the Budget for the year 2026-27 be remembered in this way: Sustainability over neglect, safety over vulnerability, inclusion over exclusion, and planning over mere reaction. Together, let us transform the Bengaluru South City Corporation into amodel urban local body for the nation.
